overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, elevated walkways, and dystopian architecture. The player character moves from street level up to an overpass overlooking a lower district, passes a burning vehicle, and continues toward a massive hotel complex with towering holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city intersection with construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking through rain-soaked streets toward an intersection with neon billboards visible ahead

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying advertisements on the side of a skyscraper
white and orange striped barriers blocking off a section of the street
street sign reading Pacific Blvd mounted on a pole at the intersection
tall street light illuminating the wet pavement with artificial light

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked urban street at night, with the camera moving forward through heavy rain. Construction barriers line the left side while a large hotel billboard glows in the distance. The wet asphalt reflects the neon lights and street lamps as the character approaches an intersection marked by a Pacific Blvd sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway ramp overlooking lower district

events.description: ascends from street level to elevated overpass revealing first view of lower district with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking up a concrete ramp to an elevated walkway while rain continues to fall

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading Pacifica Cabana with a palm tree logo visible below the overpass
concrete safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
tropical palm trees visible on the lower level below the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a ramp to an elevated overpass, transitioning from the street level to a walkway with a concrete railing. As the elevation increases, the Pacifica Cabana neon sign becomes visible below, surrounded by palm trees in the lower district. The hotel billboard shifts to the left as the perspective changes.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overpass overlooking Pacifica Cabana resort area

agents.ego_description: moving along the overpass walkway overlooking the neon-lit lower level with palm trees

entered.detail: concrete beams and supports of the elevated highway or walkway structure

segments.scene_description: Moving along the elevated overpass, the camera maintains a view of the Pacifica Cabana sign and palm trees below to the right. The concrete structure of the overpass frames the scene as rain continues to fall, with the neon glow reflecting off the wet surfaces of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit overpass with burning vehicle and hotel approach

events.description: passing a burning car with flames illuminating the wet pavement and creating smoke

agents.ego_description: walking past a burning vehicle wreckage toward the Wild Blue hotel complex

low-rise building with the Wild Blue signage and entrance
tall skyscraper with HOTEL signage at the top and large vertical billboards

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera moves past a burning car on the left, its flames casting an orange glow on the wet concrete. The Wild Blue building and hotel tower come into view ahead, with their neon signage cutting through the rainy night. The overpass continues toward this larger complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza and street beyond hotel complex

events.description: passing the Wild Blue building into more open urban plaza with scattered planters

agents.ego_description: continuing through the rain past the hotel complex into open streets with distant neon lights

entered.detail: rectangular concrete planters containing spiky desert plants lining the walkway
red neon signage of a distant building visible down the open street

segments.scene_description: Moving past the Wild Blue building, the scene opens into a wider plaza with concrete planters containing spiky plants. The hotel complex recedes to the left as the camera continues forward into a more open urban area. Distant red neon signs become visible ahead, glowing through the heavy rain and mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-soaked street level up to an elevated overpass that opens into a wide, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins by moving forward through heavy rain past construction barriers and reflecting asphalt toward a Pacific Blvd intersection. As the camera ascends a ramp to an elevated walkway, the perspective shifts to reveal the Pacifica Cabana sign and palm trees in the district below. The scene then progresses along the concrete overpass, passing a burning car that casts an orange glow across the wet surfaces before the Wild Blue building and a towering hotel complex emerge ahead. Finally, the path opens into a wider plaza with concrete planters as the hotel recedes to the left and distant red neon signs glow through the mist.
